title: T-115 — Manufacturing Operation Audit Trail screen (SET-057 §8.9.12)
prompt:
# T-115 — Manufacturing Operation Audit Trail screen (SET-057 §8.9.12)

PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §8.9.11 + §8.9.12 (Manufacturing Operations Audit Trail)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build SET-057 Manufacturing Operation Audit Trail — per-operation history viewer linked from SET-055 list 'View History' icon. Shows User / Action / Timestamp / Field diff (old → new) per change. Searchable by operation_name, user, date range.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/manufacturing-ops/[operation_id]/history/page.tsx (Server Component) reads audit_log entries WHERE entity_type='manufacturing_operation' AND entity_id=operation_id, ordered by timestamp DESC.
2. List columns: timestamp, user (display name), action (create|update|delete), changed fields summary chip.
3. Each row expandable to show field-by-field diff (old → new) per §8.9.11 spec; uses the same recursive diff helper as T-108 / T-114.
4. Toolbar: search by operation_name (header lookup), date range filter, user filter dropdown.
5. RBAC: requires `manufacturing_operations.view` (per §8.9.10) AND `settings.audit.read`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/manufacturing-ops/[operation_id]/history/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/manufacturing-ops/[operation_id]/history/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test seeds 3 audit_log entries for one manufacturing_operation (create + update + delete); asserts ordered render, expand-to-diff, RBAC.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/manufacturing-ops/[operation_id]/history/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + expand-diff.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate SET-013 global audit viewer (T-079); this is operation-scoped.
- Do not bypass withOrgContext (RLS).
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0).

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:216-344`
**Label:** `rule_detail_screen`
**Component type:** tabs

> **No exact prototype** — closest visual pattern: `rule_detail_screen` at `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:216-344`. Build in the same structural style as this screen. Re-use the Rule Detail screen's `aud` tab Audit log table pattern (admin-screens.jsx lines 338-345) plus the filter toolbar density of rules_registry_screen (152-210). Expandable rows reveal field-by-field old→new diff.

### Parity requirements (mandatory ACs)
The production implementation MUST match the prototype on three dimensions — add these as explicit ACs:
1. **Structural parity** — same sections, same field labels, same shadcn primitives invoked, same modals triggered from same actions.
2. **Visual parity** — same density tokens, same shadcn/Radix primitives (no drift to plain HTML), same layout proportions.
3. **Interaction parity** — same enable/disable rules, same loading/empty/error states, same keyboard focus order.

### Translation notes (from prototype-labels index)
- Tab state (def/ver/dry/cons/aud) with local useState → shadcn Tabs component; tab id from URL hash for deep-linking
- window.SETTINGS_RULE_DSL / window.SETTINGS_DRY_RUNS → Drizzle queries on rules_dsl and rule_dry_run_results tables
- DSL <pre> read-only display → CodeMirror or Monaco in read-only mode with JSON syntax highlighting
- Version history table (Array.from loop) → real version rows from rules_registry_versions table
- 'Diff vs current' button → Server Action calling /api/rules/:code/diff/:version returning JSON deep-diff
- Dry-run results table → paginated query on rule_dry_run_results; 'View I/O' opens RuleDryRunModal with preloaded result
- openModal('ruleDryRun') → shared Dialog trigger; pass rule and preload props
- Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

### shadcn primitives to use
`Tabs`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`, `TabsContent`, `Table`, `Badge`, `Button`

pipeline_inputs.description: Manufacturing Operation Audit Trail (SET-057): per-operation history viewer with diff and search filters.
pipeline_inputs.details:
PRD §8.9.11/§8.9.12 SET-057: `Per-operation history viewer`. Linked from SET-055 list 'View History' icon (T-077). Shows User / Action / Timestamp / Field diff (old→new) per §8.9.11 sample audit_log entries. Reuses the same diff helper as T-108 / T-114 if exposed as shared util.

Additional acceptance detail preserved from compressed AC list:
- Given the caller lacks `manufacturing_operations.view` or `settings.audit.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.
- UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Global audit log (covered by SET-013 / T-079)
acceptance_criteria: Given 3 audit_log entries exist for manufacturing_operation id 'op_789' (create + update + delete), when the page renders, then 3 history rows display in timestamp DESC with action badges.
Given the user expands the update row, when the diff renders, then changed fields (e.g. is_active true→false) appear in old→new pairs per §8.9.11 spec.
Given the user filters by date range 'last 7 days', when the list re-renders, then only entries within that window remain.

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect the task evidence, then these additional requirements are proven together: Given the caller lacks `manufacturing_operations.view` or `settings.audit.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.; UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test seeds 3 audit entries + asserts list order, expand-to-diff, date filter, RBAC 403.
GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + expand-diff renderer.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not duplicate SET-013 global audit viewer (T-079); this is operation-scoped.
